title: Why Caleb Williams is Scarier than you think.
text:
Code
library(tidyverse)


в”Ђв”Ђ Attaching core tidyverse packages в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ tidyverse 2.0.0 в”Ђв”Ђ
вњ” dplyr     1.2.0     вњ” readr     2.1.6
вњ” forcats   1.0.1     вњ” stringr   1.6.0
вњ” ggplot2   4.0.2     вњ” tibble    3.3.1
вњ” lubridate 1.9.4     вњ” tidyr     1.3.2
вњ” purrr     1.2.1     
в”Ђв”Ђ Conflicts в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ tidyverse_conflicts() в”Ђв”Ђ
вњ– dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
вњ– dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
в„№ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors


Code
library(nflreadr)


Caleb Williams, the 23-year-old Chicago Bears Quarterback, is WAY scarier than you think.


Code
bearsqb <- read_csv("data/bearsqbs.csv")


New names:
Rows: 185 Columns: 31
в”Ђв”Ђ Column specification
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ Delimiter: "," chr
(4): Player, Pos, QBrec, Player-additional dbl (26): Rk, From, To, G, AV, Cmp,
Att, Cmp%, Yds...12, TD, TD%, Int, Int%,... lgl (1): QBR
в„№ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data. в„№
Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
вЂў `Yds` -> `Yds...12`
вЂў `Yds` -> `Yds...25`


Code
bearsqb_30 <- bearsqb |>
  group_by(Player) |>
  summarise(
    games = G,
    ypg = mean(`Y/G`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  filter(games >= 30,
  ypg >= 80
         )

ggplot() +
  geom_bar(
    data = bearsqb_30,
    aes(
      x = reorder(Player, ypg),
      weight = ypg
    )
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "All Time Bears Pass Yards/Per Game",
    x = "Quarterback",
    y = "Pass Yards/Per Game",
    caption = "Data: Pro Football Reference"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    title = element_text(color = "navy", size = 15, face = "bold"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "000000"),
    panel.border = element_rect(linetype = "dashed", fill = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "orange"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "navy")
  )
